mapper.select:
SELECT mab.user_id,mab.nick as userNick,mb.user_img,mab.level,mab.fans_count,mab.region FROM member_account_bind mab LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id,mch_id,user_img FROM member ) mb ON mb.user_id = mab.user_id WHERE 1=1 AND mb.mch_id= #{mchId}
AND DATE_FORMAT(mab.create_time, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m')
AND mab.nick LIKE concat(concat('%',#{userNick}),'%')
ORDER BY fans_count DESC

SELECT mab.user_id, mab.sex, mb.user_nike, mb.user_img, mab.level, mab.nick AS userWechatNick, mbr.nick AS userDouYinNick, IFNULL(mab.fans_count, 0) AS fansCount, mab.region, mbr.third_party_tag, mab.create_time FROM member_account_bind mab LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, third_party_tag, nick FROM member_account_bind_record) mbr ON mbr.user_id = mab.user_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, user_nike, user_img, mch_id FROM member) mb ON mb.user_id = mab.user_id WHERE 1=1 AND mb.mch_id= #{mchId} GROUP BY mab.user_id ORDER BY mab.fans_count DESC
SELECT mab.user_id, mab.user_nike, mab.user_level_id as level, mab.user_img, mab.gmv FROM member mab WHERE 1=1 AND mab.mch_id= #{mchId} ORDER BY mab.gmv DESC

SELECT mta.create_by_name, mta.video, st.name as taskName FROM member_task_apply mta LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME, mch_id FROM scenic_task) st ON st.id = mta.task_id WHERE mta.video IS NOT NULL AND st.mch_id = #{mchId} ORDER BY mta.weight ASC
